overall.description: A first-person exploration of an abandoned, overgrown urban outskirts area in a futuristic setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks past a large NC corporate sign, through a security gate, and into a dusty commercial zone with solar panels, emergency flares, and construction cranes visible against a hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned overgrown field with corporate signage

agents.ego_description: walking through dry grass toward a large circular NC sign

entered.detail: large circular sign with green triangular NC logo
long curved glass and metal structure overgrown with vegetation
tall palm tree with dry fronds
futuristic high-rise towers visible through haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dry, overgrown field with the camera walking toward a prominent circular NC corporate sign. A metal barrier sits to the left while a long glass greenhouse structure and palm trees frame the scene. Futuristic skyscrapers loom in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching abandoned gas station and security gate

events.description: passes the large NC sign on the left, revealing the security gate ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a group of people near the abandoned buildings

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the abandoned gas station buildings

entered.detail: derelict building with green awning and broken windows
large metal gate structure with vertical bars

segments.scene_description: Passing the NC sign, the camera approaches an abandoned gas station on the right and a security gate straight ahead. A group of figures stands in the distance near the buildings. The glass greenhouse structure remains visible on the left as the path narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered security checkpoint with metal bars

events.description: enters the covered security gate structure with metal bars
exits the dark gate into bright sunlight revealing solar panels

agents.ego_description: walking through the metal security gate structure

entered.detail: vertical metal bars of the security checkpoint
solid concrete structure forming a covered passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, covered security checkpoint with metal bars and a concrete overhead structure. After passing through the gate, it emerges into bright sunlight revealing an open area with solar panels and a red emergency flare visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lot with solar panels and emergency flare

events.description: red emergency flare emitting thick smoke becomes prominent on the right
turns left toward the holographic billboard and overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the open area observing the solar panels and red flare

entered.detail: arrays of blue photovoltaic panels on metal frames
thick red smoke rising from a flare on the ground

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a sunlit lot filled with solar panels and a vivid red emergency flare smoking on the right. The camera turns left toward a glowing holographic billboard and an elevated overpass structure, passing modern street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial strip with kiosks and construction

events.description: approaches and passes a yellow-roofed abandoned kiosk with people nearby

agents.ego_description: walking past abandoned commercial structures toward the construction site

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the yellow kiosk

entered.detail: small abandoned structure with distinctive yellow roof and benches
large orange construction cranes against the skyline
derelict cars parked near the buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an abandoned commercial area featuring a yellow-roofed kiosk and derelict vehicles. Construction cranes dominate the right side against the dusty skyline. The camera passes the kiosk and approaches a construction site with heavy machinery and debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate, overgrown field into a sun-drenched, abandoned industrial zone. It begins by moving through dry grass toward a prominent circular NC corporate sign, framed by a glass greenhouse and distant skyscrapers looming in the haze. As the camera passes the sign, the path narrows beside an abandoned gas station and a security gate before plunging into the shadow of a dark, concrete checkpoint. The scene then bursts back into bright sunlight, emerging from the gate into an open lot filled with solar panels and a smoking red emergency flare. Finally, the camera turns toward a glowing holographic billboard and an elevated overpass, gliding past a yellow-roofed kiosk and derelict vehicles toward a construction site dominated by towering cranes against a dusty skyline.
